photos.alt: In black and white, a model in an oversized checked coat and tall boots stands on a flagstone terrace, hands behind her back.
The model wears a tan suede waistcoat, matching mini skirt and olive rubber boots on a stepping-stone path between palms and hedges.
Seen from behind, the model climbs stone steps in a burgundy dress with narrow straps and a gathered skirt, past arched plaster walls and potted plants.
The model lies back across a patterned tapestry sofa in a short-sleeved brown suede jacket and matching skirt, a table lamp lit beside her.
Hand on hip beside a tree trunk on flagstone paving, the model wears a denim drop-waist dress with lace trim and brown platform boots.
The model stands beside a tree trunk in a sleeveless denim dress, pale blue panelled doors and dappled foliage behind her.
The model sits back on a curved banquette of leaf-print cushions, one arm along the backrest, in an olive satin shirt and tall black boots.
A model in a tan suede waistcoat and checked headscarf raises one arm to a palm frond, layered gold necklaces at the neck.
The model pauses on stone steps in a burgundy pinafore over a white blouse, looking back over her shoulder, one hand on an iron gate.
Close crop of a white collared blouse with shell buttons and a burgundy strap, the model turned in profile.
Low-angle view of a model in an oversized checked jacket with a suede collar, hand on hip against pine branches and bright sky.
On a low garden wall, the model raises a hand to a pine branch in a checked jacket, tan suede miniskirt and olive rubber boots.
The model walks past a stone fountain and beds of red flowers in an oversized black blazer, short black dress and knee-high boots.
Head tipped back, eyes closed, the model rests along a leaf-print banquette in an olive satin shirt, dark leather skirt and tall black boots.
The model stands in a sunlit sitting room in a sleeveless dark green midi dress, gold curtains and patterned rugs around her.
